description:
Rewrite Neighborhood page for wayfinding MVP.

Remove the house banner. Replace content with:

NEIGHBORHOOD heading.

NOTE: Fractal is a decentralized network of apartments rather than a formal organization! So no one is in charge of sublets. The way staying here works: 1. You fill out one of the forms below. 2. An automatic message sends your info to leaseholders. 3. If a leaseholder has a room free, they can contact you. If you don't get a reply, this typically just means that no one has a room free.

Want to visit? Fill out this form: https://airtable.com/appDkSh1TsmjHzacK/shrbrfFHeMTcSJ9dd

Style: clean, practical, mobile-first. This page is functional wayfinding, not narrative.
title: Neighborhood page: housing forms + decentralized network explainer
